channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Elon Musk is bringing Silicon Valley’s ‘ask for forgiveness, not permission’ playbook to politics
item.description: Speaking to his biographer Walter Isaacson, Elon Musk said of his approach to authority: “I guess I’ve always wanted to push my chips back on the table or play the next level of the game.” Isaacson later quotes Musk as saying, “I’ve got a bad habit of biting off more than I can chew.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: AI-powered weapons scanners used in NYC subway found zero guns in one month test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A pilot program testing AI-powered weapons scanners inside some New York City subway stations this summer did not detect any passengers with firearms — but falsely alerted more than 100 times, according to newly released police data.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Gartner projects major IT spending increases for 2025
item.description: Gartner is projecting worldwide IT spending to jump by 9.3% in 2025, one of the largest percentage increases in this century, and it’s only partially driven by AI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: This agency is tasked with protecting elections from cyber attacks. If Trump wins, it could be in danger
item.description: Jen Easterly’s confirmation by the Senate in July 2021 to become director of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) was about as smooth as Senate votes get. With a résumé that includes time in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Max Ufberg, Fast Company

item.title: HHS pushes for artificial intelligence and behavioral health data
item.description: "This program addresses fast emerging challenges that inhibit the development use and advancement of interoperable Health IT," said Alison Kemp. The post HHS pushes for artificial intelligence and behavioral health data first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Google Cloud chief moves to ServiceNow as COO
item.description: Just a day after announcing his departure from Google to his LinkedIn followers, Amit Zavery said that he is joining ServiceNow as COO.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Supermicro unveils AI-optimized storage powered by Nvidia
item.description: Supermicro announced the launch of a new storage system optimized for AI workloads using multiple Nvidia BlueField-3 data processing units (DPU) combined with an all-flash array. The new Just a Bunch of Flash (JBOF) system features a 2U rack that can house up to four BlueField-3 DPUs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: TechRadar’s new VPN rankings just landed – and there are some big changes
item.description: While our regular tests often confirm rather than revolutionize the top VPN list, there have been quite a few changes this time around. Here's what it means for you.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: iOS 18.1 will fix a bug that made it harder to free up iPhone storage
item.description: With many-megapixel cameras and the ability to shoot video at up to 4K, an iPhone’s storage fills up quickly. Sure, ballooning apps and digital downloads like audiobooks and movies also take up space, but they are easy to offload and reload as needed.
item.dc:creator: Sean Captain, Fast Company

item.title: PSA: Here are Netflix’s secret codes to see all its horror movies and shows
item.description: Tired of endlessly scrolling on Netflix? These secret codes will help you find horror movies and shows in minutes.
item.dc:creator: lucy.buglass@futurenet.com (Lucy Buglass), TechRadar

item.title: Larry Magid: Summit at Oxford focuses on Generative AI regulations
item.description: Although there were expected disagreements, I was left with a strong sense of hope in some shared values
item.dc:creator: Larry Magid, The Mercury News

item.title: Roblox to enact child-safety changes giving parents more control
item.description: The changes follow Roblox’s July announcement that it would label games based on the type of content they contain, rather than by age.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Musk $1M voter lottery paused after DOJ says it might violate federal law
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) has warned Elon Musk’s pro-Trump super PAC that its daily $1 million giveaways to registered voters in swing states might violate federal law, according to several news outlets.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: New FAA rules issued for “powered-lift” aircraft such as Santa Cruz-based Joby’s air taxi
item.description: Joby Aviation said that with the final rule, the FAA “lays the groundwork necessary for Joby to launch commercial passenger service in the U.S., once the company has received type certification of its aircraft.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: 2025: The year of the AI PC
item.description: As PC, chip, and other component makers unveil products tailored to generative artificial intelligence (genAI) needs on edge devices, users can expect to see far more task automation and copilot-like assistants embedded on desktops and laptops next year.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: White House reviewing HIPAA cybersecurity updates
item.description: HHS wants to boost the cybersecurity protections required under HIPAA, as ransomware groups continue to target sensitive healthcare information. The post White House reviewing HIPAA cybersecurity updates first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft says Russia trying to smear Harris with deepfake video, AI
item.description: Russia is attempting to “undermine” Vice President Harris’s campaign using artificial intelligence (AI) generated videos while China has begun targeting a series of GOP congressional candidates ahead of November, according to a new report from Microsoft.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Why enterprises should care more about net neutrality
item.description: Net neutrality is a topic that arouses nearly as many people as politics does, in no small part because it’s been a political issue. But nearly all of that emotion is at the consumer level. CIOs and network operations and planning professionals cite the topic as important in less than 5% of cases.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to prepare your online accounts for when you die
item.description: Most people have accumulated a pile of data on their social media and digital accounts over their lifetimes.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Alkira expands NaaS platform with ZTNA capabilities
item.description: Alkira is expanding its namesake network-as-a-service (NaaS) platform with new zero trust network access (ZTNA) capabilities. Alkira provides a SaaS service for on-demand network infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: As coal plants shut in Romania, some miners transition to green energy while others are reluctant
item.description: PETRILA, Romania (AP) — For many years, Sebastian Tirinticǎ worked in a coal mine, just like his father and grandfather before him.
item.dc:creator: ANCA GURZU, Cipher News, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Big offshore wind project proposed for New York as other sites are evaluated in 3 states
item.description: BRIGANTINE, N.J. (AP) — Offshore wind energy projects in New York, New Jersey and Maryland are moving forward, as federal regulators examine the proposals and opponents escalate their legal challenges to the work.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The clever tech powering a wave of pig-butchering scams
item.description: Pig-butchering scams are all over social media platforms and are becoming more sophisticated by the day; here's how to spot the latest tricks so you don't become the next victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI dominates Gartner’s 2025 predictions
item.description: Artificial Intelligence continues to dominate this week’s Gartner IT Symposium/Xpo, as well as the research firm’s annual predictions list.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: FTC's rule banning fake online reviews goes into effect
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal rule banning fake online reviews is now in effect. The Federal Trade Commission issued the rule in August banning the sale or purchase of online reviews.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Gartner: Top 10 strategic technology trends for 2025
item.description: Gartner is sharing its annual look at the hot technologies enterprise customers should be watching out for in the coming years.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Still using 'LOL'? That could mean you are getting old
item.description: As time has seen several follow-up iterations, including ROFL and LMAO, the original "laugh out loud" acronym is a telltale sign that who you are talking to may be a millennial.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: Biden administration to provide $325 million for new Michigan semiconductor factory
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration said Monday that it would provide up to $325 million to Hemlock Semiconductor for a new factory, a move that could help give Democrats a political edge in the swing state of Michigan ahead of election day.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Stanford researchers map ‘White-Only’ properties using AI
item.description: Racially restrictive covenants are clauses in property deeds that ban individuals of a particular race from buying a home.
item.dc:creator: Hamza Fahmy, NewsNation

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Van Halen's unreleased music
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese humanoid robot could be the future of affordable in-home care
item.description: A humanoid robot made by a Chinese company proposes to redefine personalized elderly care and assistance for people with disabilities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge delays order in antitrust case requiring Google to open up its app store
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A federal judge on Friday delayed an order requiring Google to open up its Android app store to more competition until an appeals court decides whether to block the shake-up because of legal questions surrounding a jury's verdict that branded Google as an illegal monopolist.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Alabama man arrested in SEC social media account hack that led the price of bitcoin to spike
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An Alabama man was arrested Thursday for his alleged role in the January hack of a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission social media account that led the price of bitcoin to spike, the Justice Department said. Eric Council Jr.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, NewsNation
